text:
**3. New Event Names Emitted** (for tail renderer)

- `wiki.index_read` — payload: `{guide_count: N, action?: "rebuilt"}`
- `generate.tool_call` — payload: `{tool: "read_guides", slugs: [...], count: N}`
- `guide.read` — payload: `{slug: "..."}`
- `link.follow` — payload: `{from_slug: "...", to_slug: "..."}`
- `guide.create` — payload: `{slug: "...", title: "..."}`
- `guide.update` — payload: `{slug: "...", rule_added: bool}`
- `select.shortcircuit` — payload: `{reason: "no_relevant_guides"}`
